newsSince: Atomera announced (early June 2026) an MST breakthrough for GaN-on-Silicon RF, cutting parasitic interface charge >10x and improving linearity ~1000x, with third-party validation. This is incremental technical progress aimed at 5G/6G RF, not a new license or revenue event.

sources.label: BigGo Finance: Atomera positions MST for AI chips, 2026 deals

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: Atomera is a materials-IP edge-AI story with no robotics relevance and no new commercialization evidence since June 9. Prior case flagged for removal (+231% YTD, $0.32B cap, too indirect). Thesis remains weak; mild negative drift for persistent over-extension on the wrong lens.
verdicts.bull: MST could enable GAA/edge-AI nodes if a major foundry licenses it.
verdicts.neutral: Pre-revenue optionality; no robotics tie at all.
verdicts.bear: +231% YTD micro-cap; speculative, no signed commercial deal; off-lens for robotics.
